issue.title: @gitclaw /tools readiness search_files e2e 20260604T052107Z
issue.body:
Live tools readiness E2E 20260604T052107Z.

Search for "tools readiness unique search fixture phrase" so a search_files output is active.
Hidden tools readiness body token: GITCLAW_TOOLS_READINESS_BODY_20260604T052107Z
The deterministic readiness report must stay body-free and must be paired with a separate live LLM chat E2E for feature changes.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
